levels.title: 日常问候
levels.description: 最常用的日常打招呼用语

words.example: We had a good evening together.
words.example_cn: 我们一起度过了一个美好的夜晚。
她说了声再见就离开了。

words.example: Excuse me, where is the bus stop?
words.example_cn: 打扰一下，公交车站在哪里？

words.example: I see you in the photo.
I love my family very much.
My father works in a hospital.
words.example_cn: 我父亲在一家医院工作。

words.example: My brother is taller than me.
Their son is only five years old.
My grandfather is eighty years old.
My uncle works on a farm.

words.cn: 堂兄弟姐妹；表兄弟姐妹

words.example: The woman is reading a book.
There are two cats on the chair.

words.example_cn: 今天有四个学生迟到了。

words.example: Six boys are in the team.
I get up at eight o'clock.
Ten pupils are in the classroom.
There are eleven players in a team.
words.example_cn: 一支球队有十一名队员。

words.example: There are twelve months in a year.
There are a hundred people here.
I read for one hour every day.
I'll go to Beijing next week.
She is wearing a red dress.
words.example_cn: 她穿着一条红色的裙子。

words.example: Put your hands on your head.

words.example_cn: 她有一双蓝色的大眼睛。

words.example: The dog has a good nose.
She carried the baby in her arms.
Brush your teeth twice a day.
I go to school by bus.
We have an English lesson today.
I need a pen to write.
Please give me a piece of paper.
This ruler is thirty centimeters long.
My book is on the desk.
I write notes in my notebook.
words.example_cn: 我把笔记写在笔记本上。

words.example: I look up new words in the dictionary.
I finish my homework after dinner.
The nurse takes care of patients.
My father is a factory worker.
The lawyer works in a big firm.
words.example_cn: 那位律师在一家大事务所工作。

words.example: The pilot flies to many countries.
words.example_cn: 那位飞行员飞往许多国家。

words.example: The policeman helps the old man.
My mother is a good cook.
The bus driver is very friendly.
The farmer works in the field.
The scientist made a new discovery.
words.example_cn: 那位科学家有了新发现。

words.example: Our manager is having a meeting.
The clerk works in the bank.
The reporter is interviewing the star.

words.example_cn: 那位艺术家画美丽的画。

words.example: The writer published a new book.
words.example_cn: 那位作家出版了一本新书。

words.example: He found a new job last week.
words.example_cn: 他上周找到了一份新工作。

words.example: Dinner is ready, come and eat.
I had bread and milk this morning.
words.example_cn: 我今天早上吃了面包和牛奶。

words.example: I drink a glass of milk every day.
Would you like a cup of tea?
I eat an egg every morning.
words.example_cn: 我每天早上吃一个鸡蛋。

words.example: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
words.example_cn: 一天一苹果，医生远离我。

words.example: He is wearing a white shirt.
My new shoes are very comfortable.
She is wearing a red hat.
Put on your coat, it's cold.
This jacket is too small for me.
I need to buy new socks.
He drives a car to work.
I take the bus to school.
I ride a bike to the park.
The ship sails across the sea.
We rowed a boat on the lake.
There is heavy traffic on the road.
I bought a train ticket to Beijing.
words.example_cn: 我买了一张去北京的火车票。

words.example: They live in a small house.
words.example_cn: 他们住在一栋小房子里。

words.example: My room is on the second floor.
I keep my money in the bank.
We stayed at a small hotel.
We will meet at the airport.
The railway station is near here.
I often read in the library.
She buys vegetables at the market.
The sun rises in the east.
The wind is very strong today.
The clouds are white and soft.
It is very hot in summer.
There are four seasons in a year.
We swim in the river in summer.
The river runs through the city.
We spent a holiday by the sea.
words.example_cn: 我们在海边度过了假期。

words.example: Birds are singing in the tree.
The sky is full of stars.
I am happy to see you.
The brave boy saved the cat.
words.example_cn: 勇敢的男孩救了那只猫。

words.example: She is always polite to others.
words.example_cn: 她对别人总是很有礼貌。

words.example: The people here are very friendly.
She is proud of her son.
The little girl is very shy.
She is generous to the poor.
It is cruel to hurt animals.
She felt nervous before the test.
He is anxious about the result.
The smart boy solved the problem.
words.example_cn: 那个聪明的男孩解决了问题。

words.example: Books are the source of knowledge.
He is doing research on history.

words.example_cn: 科学改变了我们的生活。

words.example: She has won many academic awards.
words.example_cn: 她获得过许多学术奖项。

words.example: He won a scholarship to college.
words.example_cn: 他获得了大学的奖学金。

words.example: She studies at a famous university.
words.example_cn: 她在一所著名大学学习。

words.example: He got a degree in physics.
I will go to college next year.
The professor gave a great lecture.
words.example_cn: 那位教授做了一场精彩的讲座。

words.example: I take an English course this term.

words.example_cn: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。

words.example: They work in a chemistry laboratory.
words.example_cn: 他们在化学实验室工作。

words.example: The professor gave a lecture on art.
words.example_cn: 教授做了一场关于艺术的讲座。
这个国家的经济正在增长。

words.example: We face a serious economic problem.
words.example_cn: 我们面临严重的经济问题。

words.example: The car industry is developing fast.
I use a computer every day.
We can find news on the Internet.
words.example_cn: 我们可以在互联网上找到新闻。

words.example: The cost of living is rising.
The company made a big profit.
words.example_cn: 公司获得了丰厚的利润。

words.example: Beijing is the capital of China.

words.example_cn: 他做了一项明智的投资。

words.example: Air pollution is a serious problem.
words.example_cn: 空气污染是个严重的问题。

words.example: Health is more important than wealth.
Take this medicine twice a day.
Many diseases can be cured now.
words.example_cn: 现在许多疾病都能治愈。

words.example: Keep a balance between work and rest.
words.example_cn: 保持工作与休息的平衡。

words.example: He is under treatment in hospital.
Sports are good for physical health.
Everyone plays a role in society.
words.example_cn: 每个人在社会中都扮演一个角色。

words.example: Chinese culture has a long history.

words.example_cn: 我们应该保持我们的传统。

words.example: Each country has its own customs.
words.example_cn: 每个国家都有自己的习俗。

words.example: Every citizen should obey the law.
words.example_cn: 每个公民都应遵守法律。

words.example: The police try to stop crime.
He holds a strong belief in honesty.
The population of the city is growing.
words.example_cn: 这座城市的人口在增长。

words.example: The country cares about people's welfare.
She works as a volunteer in the hospital.
He achieved his goal at last.
Knowing English is a great advantage.
She has the ambition to be a doctor.
He made an attempt to climb the mountain.

words.example_cn: 阅读给我们带来许多好处。
我们通过电子邮件交流。

words.example: She is confident about the exam.
This is an effective way to learn.
words.example_cn: 这是一种有效的学习方法。
水对生命是必不可少的。

words.example: I want to improve my English.
words.example_cn: 我想提高我的英语水平。
